questions.question: Explain the concept of a Stack data structure. Provide an example of how a Stack can be used in real-life applications.
questions.hint: Describe the operations performed on a Stack and how it is used in a typical scenario.

questions.question: Write a simple implementation of a Stack using an array in a programming language of your choice. Ensure your implementation includes methods for push, pop, and isEmpty.
questions.hint: Consider using a language like Python or Java for this implementation.

questions.question: What is the difference between a Linked List and an Array in terms of memory usage and access time? Provide an example of when you would choose to use each.
questions.hint: Compare the pros and cons of using Linked Lists and Arrays in different scenarios.
